_comment: Per-repo .mcp.json template. Synced (template mode, substitute:true) to the product's root .mcp.json only if missing — never clobbers an existing one. {{CBM_BIN}} is filled from runtime.config.yaml. serena is the universal symbol/edit + LSP layer (Python/TS/C#/... via --project-from-cwd). codebase-memory-mcp is the Python/TS/Go code-graph — a pure-C#/WPF repo can DELETE that entry and instead follow profiles/csharp/adopt.md (serena language=csharp + a Roslyn MCP such as CWM.RoslynNavigator). context7/exa/playwright come from plugins or ~/.claude, not this file.
